commands.narrative:
## Roster Changes Since Yesterday

No roster changes to report. Yesterday's active_strategies_snapshot was empty (first rollout day with this field populated), so a formal diff cannot be computed. Today's snapshot captures 47 enabled strategies across 58 total in the roster. No adds, removes, or toggles visible between the 2026-05-14 and 2026-05-15 reports.

## Headline: One Promotable Strategy, Two Stuck Action Items

**v21-bottom-excluded** is the only strategy clearing all 4 promotion gates: n=168, total_net_sol=+3.69 SOL, drop_top3=+1.69 SOL, monthly=28.4 SOL/mo, composite score 100/100. The promote proposal (ai-2026-05-14-001) has been PROPOSED since yesterday and awaits operator execution. The DECAYING flag on this strategy is median-based — recent-30 median of -18.95% vs all-time -8.72%, both negative — which is expected fat-tail behavior for a wide-universe strategy. The critical outlier check (drop_top3=+1.69 SOL) confirms the edge is real and distributed across the trade sample, not concentrated in 1-3 lottery wins. This is not a kill signal; it's a memcoin distribution shape.

**v14-snipers-liq** kill proposal (ai-2026-05-14-002) is also stuck. At n=91, drop_top3=-2.64 SOL, monthly=1.29 SOL/mo, this strategy has no realistic path to the bar. It has appeared on the kill list twice (2026-05-10, 2026-05-14) with no action. Recommend operator execute the kill this cycle.

## Today's Session (2026-05-15, early UTC)

Only 7 trades so far today — all on the same graduation (id 21584), all timeout exits at -21.18% (-0.1059 SOL each). Affected strategies: v12-bcage1d-dd10, v21-vel5-mono-dd, v21-bottom-excluded, v25-bot-excl-calm, v25-bot-excl-breakeven, v25-bot-excl-tp150, v25-bot-excl-mono. Today's net: -0.74 SOL, consistent with normal variance on a single losing graduation.

Yesterday (2026-05-14) was more active at 418 total trades. Best performers by net_sol_yesterday: v20-vel2050-dd-base (+1.53 SOL, 12 trades), v20-vel2050-dd-sl20 (+1.30 SOL, 12 trades), v23-repeat-recovery (+1.03 SOL, 2 trades), v9shadow-velmono-dev (+0.85 SOL, 3 trades). Worst: v12-vel2050-liq-dd15 (-0.74 SOL, 7 trades), v21-bottom-excluded (-0.44 SOL, 41 trades — expected for a wide-universe strategy at this trade size).

## New Kill Candidates

Four strategies are newly flagged for early kill based on deeply negative trajectories:

1. **v22-snipers-flow** (n=36): drop_top3=-2.47, monthly=-13.8 SOL/mo, DECAYING flag, mean=-9.3%. This was in yesterday's kill narrative but no action item was created. Now escalating to an action item.
2. **v25-bot-excl-calm** (n=32): drop_top3=-3.93, monthly=-70.2 SOL/mo. The sum_abs<60 filter on the bot-excl universe is catastrophically failing. Worst run-rate bleeder in the roster.
3. **v25-bot-excl-breakeven** (n=40): drop_top3=-2.57, monthly=-25.3 SOL/mo. Breakeven stop modification destroys P&L on this universe.
4. **v21-vel2050-dd-trail** (n=22): drop_top3=-1.75, monthly=-10.4 SOL/mo, trimmed_mean=-10.97%. The trailing exit (HWM>=20%, drop 5%) consistently underperforms the static exit on this filter pair. None of the 22 trades have generated positive trailing exit behavior.

All four have n<100, so they do not meet the mandatory kill threshold. However, the rate of deterioration and extreme negative monthly run rates justify early kill recommendations to preserve simulation capital.

## Watch List: Approaching the Bar

- **v10-best-double** (score 95.2): n=76, drop_top3=+1.17, monthly=7.69 SOL/mo. 3/4 gates pass — only n<100 is missing. 24 more trades needed. DECAYING flag on median but fat-tail mean still positive (+9.19%). Closest approach after v21-bottom-excluded.
- **v9shadow-velmono-dev** (score 86): n=30, drop_top3=+3.16, monthly=10.6 SOL/mo. Remarkable outlier robustness (top1_contribution=11.7%, top3=34.4%) — edge is well-distributed. Needs 70 more trades.
- **v20-vel2050-dd-base** (score 85.8): n=29, drop_top3=+0.39, monthly=15.7 SOL/mo. Velocity 20-50 + drawdown gate shows strong per-trade economics; needs n accumulation.

## Cross-Day Pattern Notes

The vwap_pullback + climbing_t30_t45 combo (#1 in best-combos at opt_avg_ret=15.67%, n=50) is represented by v23-vwap-climbing (n=3) which is still accumulating. The high leaderboard opt_avg_ret likely reflects genuine selection advantage — these strategies should build n quickly given the combo's n=50 in the research pool.

The v14-snipers-liq kill recommendation has now appeared in 3 separate daily reports (2026-05-10, 2026-05-14, 2026-05-15) without being executed. This is the stuck-kill pattern; the longer it runs, the further drop_top3 will go negative.

## Operator Next Step

Execute the two open action items: (1) promote v21-bottom-excluded to live at conservative 0.1 SOL trade size with a 20-trade review gate; (2) kill v14-snipers-liq. Then consider batch-killing v22-snipers-flow, v25-bot-excl-calm, v25-bot-excl-breakeven, and v21-vel2050-dd-trail per the new action items below — freeing up 4 strategy slots and eliminating ~110 SOL/mo in simulated losses from the research pool.

anomalies.detail: v14-snipers-liq kill proposal has been PROPOSED for 2+ days (ai-2026-05-14-002). n=91, drop_top3=-2.64 SOL. Execute kill this cycle.
v21-bottom-excluded promote proposal (ai-2026-05-14-001) pending since 2026-05-14. Score=100, all 4 gates pass, n=168, drop_top3=+1.69. Ready for live.
v25-bot-excl-calm: monthly=-70.2 SOL/mo (n=32, drop_top3=-3.93). Worst run-rate in roster. Recommend early kill.
v25-bot-excl-breakeven: monthly=-25.3 SOL/mo (n=40, drop_top3=-2.57). Recommend early kill.
v22-snipers-flow DECAYING: n=36, drop_top3=-2.47, monthly=-13.8. Was in yesterday's kill narrative; no action item created. Escalating today.
v10-best-double DECAYING (recent-30 median -28.65% vs all -8.45%). Fat-tail strategy; cross-check: drop_top3=+1.17 SOL confirms real edge. Watch, do not kill.
v21-bottom-excluded DECAYING (recent-30 median -18.95%). Fat-tail confirmed by drop_top3=+1.69. Not a kill signal — promotion candidate.
v21-vel2050-dd-trail: n=22, monthly=-10.4 SOL/mo, trimmed_mean=-10.97%. Trailing exit consistently underperforms static exit on vel20-50+dd universe.

patterns: v14-snipers-liq kill has appeared in 3 daily reports (05-10, 05-14, 05-15) without execution — stuck kill requiring operator action.
v20-vel2050 variants (base + sl20) are the most consistent daily earners at n=29 each, both 3/4 gates passing. vel 20-50 + drawdown gate appears to be a genuine edge cluster.

v25 bot-excl cohort is mixed: vel2050 and climbing variants have moderate signal, but calm/breakeven/mono/tp150 are deeply negative — the bot-excl universe benefits from velocity and momentum filters, not calm/breakeven modifications.
vwap_pullback combos dominate best-combos leaderboard (top 2 spots) but all have n<50 in shadow. Watch period continues.

v9shadow-velmono-dev (vel 20-50 + mono>0.5 + dev>5%) shows exceptional outlier robustness (top3_contribution=34.4%, drop_top3=+3.16 SOL) at n=30 — the dev>5% filter appears to be adding meaningful selection on top of the vel/mono base.

promote.reason: Composite score 100/100. All 4 gates clear: n=168, drop_top3=+1.69 SOL, total=+3.69 SOL, monthly=28.4 SOL/mo. DECAYING flag is median-based on fat-tail universe — drop_top3 confirms real distributed edge. Recommend promote to live at 0.1 SOL trade size with 20-trade review gate.

kill.reason: n=91, drop_top3=-2.64 SOL, monthly=1.29 SOL/mo. Third consecutive daily report recommending kill. INVALID trajectory: drop_top3 will not recover to positive at n=100+. Execute kill.
n=36, drop_top3=-2.47 SOL, monthly=-13.8 SOL/mo. DECAYING. Was in 2026-05-14 kill narrative without action item; escalating. Early kill to stop bleeding.
n=32, drop_top3=-3.93 SOL, monthly=-70.2 SOL/mo. Worst bleeder in roster. sum_abs<60 filter on bot-excl universe failing comprehensively.
n=40, drop_top3=-2.57 SOL, monthly=-25.3 SOL/mo. Breakeven stop modification at 20% destroys P&L on this universe.

n=22, drop_top3=-1.75 SOL, monthly=-10.4 SOL/mo, trimmed_mean=-10.97%. Trailing exit (HWM>=20%, drop 5%) consistently loses on vel20-50+dd universe. Static exit (v20-vel2050-dd-base) outperforms significantly.

watch.reason: Score 95.2, n=76 (needs 24 more trades for n=100). 3/4 gates pass: drop_top3=+1.17, total=+3.49, monthly=7.69 SOL/mo. DECAYING median flag is fat-tail behavior; mean still positive. Pacing toward bar.
Score 86, n=30. Exceptional outlier robustness: drop_top3=+3.16 SOL, top3_contribution=34.4%, trimmed_mean=+32.55%. Needs 70 more trades for n=100.
Score 85.8, n=29. drop_top3=+0.39, monthly=15.7 SOL/mo. 3/4 gates pass pending n. Most promising v20 variant (sl20 variant has drop_top3=+0.12 — base is more robust).
Score 89.4, n=47. drop_top3=+0.39, monthly=7.4 SOL/mo. 3/4 gates pass. Needs 53 more trades.

action_items.summary: Kill v22-snipers-flow — n=36, drop_top3=-2.47 SOL, monthly=-13.8 SOL/mo. DECAYING. Was in 2026-05-14 kill narrative without an action item; escalating today.
Kill v25-bot-excl-calm (monthly=-70.2 SOL/mo, drop_top3=-3.93) and v25-bot-excl-breakeven (monthly=-25.3 SOL/mo, drop_top3=-2.57). Both are extreme bleeders with no recovery path.
Kill v21-vel2050-dd-trail — trailing exit variant (HWM>=20%, drop 5%) consistently underperforms static on vel20-50+dd universe. n=22, monthly=-10.4 SOL/mo, drop_top3=-1.75.
